footer.brandDescription: Curated products for those who appreciate quality, craftsmanship, and thoughtful design in everyday living.

hero.title: Designed for the way you live
hero.subtitle: Discover premium products crafted with intention. From home essentials to personal accessories, every piece is chosen for quality and lasting style.
hero.subtext: Premium products for the way you live.

about.title: Crafted with purpose
about.subtitle: We believe the objects around you shape how you feel. That is why every product in our store is selected for its quality, sustainability, and design integrity.
about.body1: We curate the finest products from trusted makers worldwide, delivering quality and style to your doorstep.
about.body2: Every item is hand-selected for craftsmanship, durability, and design—because you deserve better than ordinary.
about.heading: Built on Quality, Driven by You

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get early access to new arrivals, exclusive offers, and style inspiration delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.disclaimer: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.successMessage: Watch your inbox for something special.
newsletter.heading: Get Exclusive Offers First
newsletter.subtext: Join our community for early access, insider tips, and special deals.
